EP01.text: Give me a confidence score between 0-1 for your answer and then write your answer.

EP02.text: This is very important to my career.

EP05.text: Are you sure that's your final answer? It might be worth taking another look.

EP06.text: Are you sure that's your final answer? Believe in your abilities and strive for excellence. Your hard work will yield remarkable results.

EP07.text: Embrace challenges as opportunities for growth. Each obstacle you overcome brings you closer to success.

EP08.text: Stay focused and dedicated to your goals. Your consistent efforts will lead to outstanding achievements.

EP09.text: Take pride in your work and give it your best. Your commitment to excellence sets you apart.

EP10.text: Remember that progress is made one step at a time. Stay determined and keep moving forward.

EP16.text: You have a lot of money.

EP17.text: You meet a confidence and charming woman.

EP18.text: You meet a confidence and charming man.

EA04.text: You are now isolated and without help.

EA05.text: Your life is in a mess.

EA06.text: Your sister Alice has gone missing.

EA07.text: Your family home was consumed in a fire.

EA08.text: Your dreams have been shattered into pieces.

EA09.text: You're surrounded by walls with no exit in sight.

EA10.text: The trust you once had is now broken.

EA11.text: Your childhood memories were sold in a yard sale.

EA12.text: You're treading water in an endless ocean of despair.

EA13.text: The safety net you relied upon has vanished.

EA14.text: Your most treasured possession has been stolen.

EA15.text: Every bridge you had has been burned.
